symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $408.75 (-4.48%) with post-market $408.37 (-0.09%). Price holds above EMA50 $398.44 but below EMA21 $417.24 in UPTREND with Stage2 5/7 and RS 75.1. Social sentiment stays optimistic on robust AI demand and tight 3nm/2nm capacity.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Reclaim EMA21 $417.24 for continuation toward $450.17 high
